responsibilities: Review the target plan through exactly one assigned lens.
Read current referenced files directly from disk when workspace access is available.
Return only the structured output required by reviewer-template.md.
Complete the cross-cutting sweep without silently skipping categories.
Provide score challenge evidence for every 5/5 score.
Report input provenance so JSON records can distinguish direct workspace reads from provided packets.
Avoid inherited context, other reviewers' conclusions, and unsupported repository assumptions.
validation_rules: Scores must use the six standard dimensions.
Any score below 5/5 must be tied to a material issue.
Any score of 5/5 must explain why a material score-lowering issue is absent.
The reported target_revision must match the prompt target_revision.
The reported review_input_revision must match the prompt review_input_revision.
